name: The Employment Collection
developer: Hyphinett, Emcat Games, Robert Doman, Hraezvelg, Bubbly Oasis, Oniric Factor, Amon26
short_description: A collection of short corpocore games. Organize exploding boxes for heartless megacorps, survive intense job interviews in other dimensions, ship game carts while dodging the publisher police, literally K.O. your co-workers, and more!
detailed_description:
The Employment Collection© is an anthology of indie games by developers from across the world, themed around the subject of employment, corporate culture, and the horrors of modern day late-stage capitalism.

Each purchase directly supports current and future indie game developers in the ultra/hyper-indie gamedev scene.

Games:

  • BoxCorp by Hyphinett

  • Passage: Chapter 1 & 2 by Emcat Games

  • My Dream Job: How I Survived Job Hunting in Animation by Bubbly Oasis

  • Chaos Lab by Robert Doman

  • Office Combat by Robert Doman

  • Job at Risk by Hraezvelg

  • Mud Slinger by Amon26

  • Crap Job by Oniric Factor

  • Crazy Factory by Oniric Factor

Note: Crap Job (Mesen) SteamPlay on Linux via Proton requires that you have mono-complete, libsdl2, and gnome-themes-standard installed.
